summary: Outstanding performance featuring a brilliant Althea with Brent on keys and Jerry’s debut Tiger guitar, though recording details are unspecified.
review: The reviews rave about the musical magic of this concert – from Brent's lush keyboards on the first‑ever live Althea to the historic debut of Jerry’s custom ‘Tiger’ guitar, plus memorable pairings like Lost Sailor/Deal and Scarlet > Fire. No reviewer comments on the audio source or fidelity, so the recording quality remains unknown, but the musical content is universally praised.

ai_rating.rationale: Three positive reviews (4‑5 stars) highlight strong musicianship and historic moments; lack of recording comments keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mentioned soundboard, audience, or any audio issues, so recording quality cannot be assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note thoughtful song pairings (e.g., Lost Sailor with Deal or Althea) and seamless transitions like Scarlet > Fire, indicating a well‑crafted set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for 'sweetest Garcia' vibe; first show featuring his custom Tiger guitar.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work on Althea highlighted as essential to the song’s essence.
